roles.name: u_library_student
roles.description: Library Student role. Allowed to view catalog, submit and manage own borrow requests.

roles.name: u_library_librarian
roles.description: Library Librarian role. Full CRUD access on books, manage and approve all borrow requests, run reports.

acls.description: Allows students and librarians to view books.
Allows only librarians to create new books.
Allows only librarians to update books.
Allows only librarians to delete books.
Allows students and librarians to submit borrow requests.
Allows students to view their own requests and librarians to view all requests.
acls.script: if (gs.hasRole('u_library_librarian')) { answer = true; } else { answer = (current.u_student == gs.getUserID()); }

acls.description: Allows librarians full write access. Students can only edit their own pending requests.
acls.script: if (gs.hasRole('u_library_librarian')) { answer = true; } else { answer = (current.u_student == gs.getUserID() && current.u_status == 'pending'); }

acls.description: Restricts approval state updates to Librarians only.
Restricts due date adjustments to Librarians only.
Restricts comments updating to Librarians only.
